topic: Perpetuals & derivatives DEX volume over time
summary: On-chain perpetual/derivatives DEX trading volume has grown from a near-rounding-error share of crypto derivatives in 2020-2021 into a multi-trillion-dollar annual market. Early leaders were dYdX (orderbook perps, peaked 2021-2022) and GMX (Arbitrum, rose in the 2022 bear market). Total perp-DEX annual volume was roughly $647.6B in 2023 and ~$1.5 trillion in 2024 (+138% YoY, per CoinGecko/Cointelegraph using DefiLlama data). 2025 was the breakout year: cumulative lifetime perp-DEX volume reached ~$12.09T by year end, up from ~$4.1T at the start of 2025, meaning roughly $7.9T (~65% of all-time volume) was traded in 2025 alone, with H2 2025 (~$5.74T) dwarfing H1 (~$2.1T). Monthly volume first crossed $1 trillion in October 2025. The dominant story of 2024-2026 is Hyperliquid, which overtook dYdX/GMX/Jupiter in late 2024 (66% on-chain share in Dec 2024), traded ~$1.57T in its first ~12 months and ~$2.9T in full-year 2025, peaking near 70-80% of on-chain perp-DEX share in mid-2025 before competition from Aster, Lighter, edgeX, Pacifica, Extended and Variational compressed its share to roughly 34-44% by early 2026. NOTE ON CONFLICTS: 2025 totals differ by source/methodology (Cointelegraph/DefiLlama ~$7.9T for calendar 2025; CoinGecko's State of Crypto Perpetuals 2026 restates 2025 perp-DEX volume as $6.38T and 2024 as $1.50T). Market-share figures also differ by denominator: ~3.9% (Hyperliquid vs ALL perp exchanges incl. CEXes, CoinGecko 2026) vs ~34-44% (Hyperliquid vs on-chain perp DEXes only, 2026). DefiLlama's free API moved fully behind a paid plan (HTTP 402) during this research, so figures rely on reputable secondary reporting that cites DefiLlama, plus CoinGecko Research and The Block. Treat single-source 2026 monthly snapshots as medium confidence.

series.label: Total perpetual/derivatives DEX volume (annual, all protocols)

points.note: Approximate / negligible. Perp DEXs barely existed; dYdX perpetuals launched 2020 and DEXs were ~1% of global perp trading. Low confidence, rough order of magnitude.
Approximate. dYdX cumulative ~$322B by end-2021 plus smaller GMX/Perpetual Protocol volume; dYdX weekly volume ~$10B after Aug 2021 airdrop. Low-medium confidence.
Approximate. dYdX alone did $466.3B in 2022; GMX rose in the bear market. Rough sector estimate, low-medium confidence.
$647.6B = top-10 decentralized perp exchanges full-year 2023 (CoinGecko State of Crypto Perpetuals 2024). High confidence.
$1.5T for top-10 perp DEXs, +138.1% YoY vs 2023 (CoinGecko/Cointelegraph, DefiLlama data). CoinGecko 2026 report restates 2024 as $1.50T. High confidence.

~$7.9T traded in calendar 2025 per DefiLlama via Cointelegraph (~65% of all-time lifetime volume). CONFLICT: CoinGecko State of Crypto Perpetuals 2026 reports 2025 perp-DEX volume as $6.38T. Medium-high confidence; use range $6.4T-$7.9T.

April 2026 monthly perp-DEX volume = $481.84B; Jan 2026 = $751.59B; Jan-Apr 2026 monthly average $611.57B (CoinGecko State of Crypto Perpetuals 2026). This is a MONTHLY value (not annual) for the latest 2026 data point. Medium confidence.

series.label: Total perpetual/derivatives DEX cumulative lifetime volume

points.note: ~$4.1T cumulative lifetime perp-DEX volume at the start of 2025 (DefiLlama via Cointelegraph). Medium-high confidence.
~$12.09T cumulative lifetime perp-DEX volume by end of 2025; ~$7.9T (65%) traded in 2025 alone. All-time-high cumulative. Medium-high confidence.
First-ever month above $1 trillion in on-chain perp-DEX volume (October 2025). Oct/Nov/Dec 2025 each exceeded $1T. Medium-high confidence.
January 2026 monthly perp-DEX volume (CoinGecko 2026 report). Medium confidence.
April 2026 monthly perp-DEX volume; declined from Jan as the late-2025 frenzy cooled. Medium confidence.

~$1.571T perps volume over trailing ~12 months reported by The Block; Hyperliquid's monthly volume doubled from ~$75B (Nov) to ~$150B (Dec 2024) around its HYPE airdrop. High confidence (trailing-12mo as of early 2025).
~$2.9T full-year 2025 (ASXN data via CryptoBriefing; ~$2.95T per Phemex), avg ~$83.4B/day. NOTE: a Lookonchain post citing '~$30 trillion' appears to be an error/typo. High confidence at ~$2.9T.

series.label: Hyperliquid market share of on-chain perp-DEX volume

points.note: Hyperliquid reached a high of 66% on-chain perp-DEX market share in December 2024 (>55% for Q4). High confidence.
~71% on-chain perp-DEX share in May 2025 (peak dominance). Medium-high confidence.
70-80% on-chain perp-DEX share by Aug 2025; >$350B monthly, frequently >$30B/day. Medium confidence (range).
Fell to ~38% by late 2025 as Aster, Lighter, edgeX gained share. Medium confidence.
~36.4% of on-chain perp-DEX volume in January 2026. Medium confidence.

Climbed back to ~44% of on-chain perp-DEX volume by ~April 2026 (only major perp exchange to gain share in 2026). NOTE: vs ALL perp exchanges incl. CEXes, Hyperliquid was ~3.9% (CoinGecko 2026, $190.28B April). Medium confidence; denominator-sensitive.
~$322B cumulative volume by end-2021 (dYdX weekly volume ~$10B after Aug 2021 airdrop). Medium confidence.
$466.3B traded in 2022 with $137.8M fees, ~33,900 traders; +140% YoY. dYdX was the clear perp-DEX leader (>70% share early 2023). High confidence.

series.label: dYdX market share of on-chain perp-DEX volume

points.note: ~73% on-chain perp-DEX market share in January 2023 (dominant leader). High confidence.
Declined to ~7% by December 2024 as Hyperliquid and Jupiter took share. High confidence.
~$280-300B cumulative all-time GMX trading volume (V1+V2). GMX rose to prominence in the 2022 bear market on Arbitrum; did <$500M/day in March 2023. Medium confidence (round figure).
All-time-high monthly volume of ~$43.4B in November 2024. Jupiter became the #2 perp DEX in 2024 (largest on Solana); >$100B cumulative since launch by Oct 2024. Medium confidence.

key_facts.claim: Total decentralized perpetual exchange volume reached ~$1.5 trillion in 2024, a +138.1% increase from $647.6 billion in 2023 (top-10 perp DEXs).
Cumulative lifetime perp-DEX volume reached ~$12.09 trillion by end of 2025, up from ~$4.1 trillion at the start of 2025; ~$7.9T (65% of all-time) was traded in 2025 alone.
CONFLICTING SOURCE: CoinGecko's State of Crypto Perpetuals Report 2026 reports 2025 perp-DEX volume as $6.38T and 2024 as $1.50T (methodology differs from DefiLlama's $7.9T for 2025).
key_facts.source_name: CoinGecko State of Crypto Perpetuals Report 2026

key_facts.claim: H2 2025 (~$5.74T, 73% of the year) dwarfed H1 2025 (~$2.1T); on-chain perp-DEX monthly volume first crossed $1 trillion in October 2025.
key_facts.value: $5.74T H2 vs $2.1T H1; $1T+ month in Oct 2025

key_facts.claim: Hyperliquid traded ~$1.571 trillion in perps over its first ~12 months (with ~$300M cumulative revenue) and ~$2.9 trillion in full-year 2025.
Hyperliquid's highest single-day perps volume reached ~$32 billion; daily volume frequently exceeded $30B in mid-2025 (avg ~$83.4B/day in 2025).

Hyperliquid's on-chain perp-DEX market share peaked at ~66% in Dec 2024 and ~70-80% in mid-2025, then fell to ~36-44% by early 2026 amid competition from Aster, Lighter, edgeX, Pacifica, Extended, Variational.
dYdX was the early perp-DEX leader: $466.3B volume in 2022 (+140% YoY, $137.8M fees) and ~73% on-chain share in Jan 2023, but fell to ~7% share by Dec 2024.
Jupiter Perps (Solana) hit an all-time-high monthly volume of ~$43.4B in November 2024 and became the #2 perp DEX in 2024; surpassed $100B cumulative volume by Oct 2024.
GMX cumulative all-time trading volume is roughly $280-300 billion (V1+V2 on Arbitrum/Avalanche); GMX rose in the 2022 bear market and did <$500M/day in March 2023.

In April 2026 Hyperliquid traded $190.28B (monthly), ranking ~#9 among ALL perp exchanges (incl. CEXes) at ~3.9% of total perp-exchange volume; perp-DEX OI was 13.5% of all perp OI and DEX-to-CEX volume ratio was ~10% (peak 13% Nov 2025).
key_facts.value: $190.28B Hyperliquid April 2026; 13.5% OI share; 10% DEX/CEX ratio
key_facts.source_name: CoinGecko State of Crypto Perpetuals Report 2026

key_facts.claim: Aster and Lighter were the main 2025 challengers: Aster peaked at ~$259B/month (Oct-Nov 2025) and nearly $36B in a single day in Sept 2025; Lighter exceeded $100B/month by Q3 2025.

DATA-ACCESS NOTE: DefiLlama's free overview/summary API endpoints for derivatives now return HTTP 402 (paid plan required), so per-protocol annual series rely on reputable secondary sources that cite DefiLlama plus CoinGecko Research and The Block.

top_entities.metric: FY2025 perps volume; on-chain market share

top_entities.value: ~$43.4B (Nov 2024 ATH); #2 perp DEX in 2024, largest on Solana

top_entities.name: edgeX
top_entities.value: ~26.6% of on-chain perp-DEX volume early 2026 (S-tier challenger)

top_entities.value: Mid-tier perp DEX in 2024; full-year volume not reliably sourced (low confidence)
